title: oenothera interior
intro: Oenothera interior, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its fragrant, yellow flowers that bloom in the evening. The seeds of the plant contain a rich source of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that is used for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Evening Primrose include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Evening Primrose is often prepared as an oil or supplement, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including eczema, arthritis, and menstrual cramps.
